title: crotalaria alexandri
intro: Crotalaria alexandri, also known as Alexandrian rattlebox or Alexandrian bush caltrop, is a flowering plant species belonging to the legume family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. Its health benefits include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make decoctions or infusions, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
